overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a waterfront urban area at dusk. The player walks along a road past an industrial building, enters a covered parking structure, and explores a rooftop settlement with makeshift shelters and abandoned vehicles.

events.description: camera turns left to look out over the water at the distant mountain range
camera turns back to face forward along the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk, pausing to admire the view of the water and mountains

entered.detail: metal guardrail separating the sidewalk from the water
large building with distinctive sloped roof and green-tinted windows
elevated highway or walkway structure spanning the road ahead
dark silhouetted mountains across the water
calm water reflecting the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a waterfront promenade at dusk, with the camera walking along a concrete sidewalk next to a metal guardrail. The angular industrial building looms ahead while mountains and water stretch out to the left. The camera briefly pans to admire the view before continuing forward.

events.description: approaching the building entrance with glowing neon signage becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road toward the industrial building, passing street furniture and barriers

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic advertisement on the building facade
red and white striped concrete blocks lining the sidewalk
tall pole with illuminated light fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the asphalt road toward the industrial building, which now dominates the right side of the frame. A bright green holographic billboard becomes visible on the building's exterior. Concrete barriers line the sidewalk as the camera approaches the entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with abandoned vehicles

events.description: entering the covered parking structure from the outdoor street
moving deeper into the structure where fluorescent ceiling lights dominate the illumination

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered parking garage, passing between concrete pillars and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: large concrete roof structure with open sides supported by pillars
long illuminated tubes hanging from the ceiling providing artificial lighting
derelict yellow sports car with missing wheels and damaged body
thick square columns supporting the roof structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered parking garage, transitioning from natural dusk light to artificial fluorescent illumination. The space contains abandoned vehicles including a damaged sports car, with concrete pillars lining the path. The environment feels enclosed and industrial.

events.description: exiting the covered parking onto an open rooftop area with makeshift living spaces
discovering tent encampment and camping equipment indicating squatters

agents.ego_description: exploring the rooftop settlement, examining abandoned cars, tents, and makeshift living arrangements

entered.detail: large blue metal shipping container used as shelter
small dome tent with red and white coloring set up on the rooftop
yellow metal railing along the edge of the roof
futuristic city buildings visible on the horizon against the dusk sky
large vertical pipes emitting smoke or steam
chair, table, and scattered supplies indicating temporary residence

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an open rooftop that serves as an informal settlement, with shipping containers, tents, and camping equipment scattered about. The view opens up to show a distant futuristic city skyline while industrial pipes vent smoke nearby. The camera explores the area, passing makeshift shelters and abandoned vehicles before approaching another covered structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide waterfront promenade at dusk into the enclosed depths of an industrial complex and finally up to a makeshift rooftop settlement. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a metal guardrail, briefly panning toward distant mountains and water before proceeding toward a looming industrial building. As the camera advances along the asphalt road, a bright green holographic billboard emerges on the building's exterior, leading the viewer past concrete barriers and into the artificial fluorescent glow of a covered parking garage filled with abandoned vehicles. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the industrial enclosure onto a rooftop settlement scattered with shipping containers and tents. Finally, the view expands to reveal a futuristic city skyline and smoking industrial pipes as the camera explores the makeshift shelters and abandoned cars.
